artifactsTitle: The following artifacts will be created:
deliverablesDescription: Confirm you have manually reviewed the project deliverables. This is the core human oversight step.
describeChanges: Describe what changed in the requirements
editDocumentDescription: This document has been pre-populated from your release comments. Edit as needed — this will become DIFF_PROTOCOL_{{version}}.md.
fallbackPlanHelper: How to revert if issues are discovered (e.g. git checkout v1.0)
knownLimitationsPlaceholder: Any caveats, known issues, or areas where AI output required correction
noComments: No release comments have been added yet. You can still proceed — the release document editor in the next step allows you to add change annotations manually.
requirementsChanged: Requirements have changed since last release
requirementsDescription: Review the project requirements below. Confirm they accurately reflect the project intent, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
reviewChangesDescription: The following files have release comments that will be compiled into the diff protocol.
reviewedCode: I have reviewed all code files (logic, test coverage, security)
reviewedConfig: I have reviewed all configuration (settings, credentials, environment)
reviewedDocs: I have reviewed all documents (accuracy, completeness)
summaryPlaceholder: 1-2 sentence description of what was built/changed
